name: Fishbone Diagram (Ishikawa)
what_it_is: Structured visualization of all possible causes organized into categories - People, Process, Technology, Environment, Materials, Measurement.
core_mechanic: Problem at the head. Six category bones. Brainstorm causes per category. Identify most likely and most testable. Prioritize by likelihood x testability.
when_to_use: Multiple possible causes and need to explore broadly before narrowing / Team diagnosis / When Five Whys has surfaced multiple branching answers / Post-mortems on complex failures
when_not_to_use: Simple linear cause-effect (Five Whys is sufficient) / When speed is needed
ideaos_application: Agent 3 maps most likely causes per category, highlights 2 categories with highest density of plausible causes, recommends first investigation action for each.
